title: Spicy Juicy French Persian Cucumber Casserole
description: A vibrant, onepot French dish that marries the crispness of Persian cucumber with a savory, mildly spicy Mediterranean flair.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) and lightly grease a 9×9‑inch baking dish.

Toss the sliced Persian cucumber, thinly sliced red onion, halved cherry tomatoes, minced garlic, chopped dill, lemon juice, lemon zest, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes in a bowl until the vegetables are evenly coated with oil and seasonings.
Spread the seasoned cucumber mixture evenly in the prepared baking dish.
Sprinkle the crumbled goat cheese over the top, then evenly distribute the breadcrumbs.
Bake for 25–30 minutes, or until the top turns golden brown and the cucumbers are tender but still firm.
Remove from the oven and let the casserole rest for 5 minutes to set the flavors.
Optionally garnish with a sprinkle of fresh parsley before serving.
Serve warm, enjoying the juicy, spicy, and fragrant layers of this French‑Persian fusion.
